summary: Iteration 24 - Stories Video System Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). All video story features verified: ffmpeg accessible at /usr/bin/ffmpeg with libx264 encoder, POST /api/upload returns thumbnail URL for videos, POST /api/stories creates stories with thumbnails for video type, GET /api/stories returns stories with thumbnail field populated, GET /api/media/{filename} supports Range requests (HTTP 206) for iOS video streaming, all 21 video stories in DB have non-null thumbnail fields.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only testing)

critical_code_review_comments: ffmpeg - VERIFIED: Accessible at /usr/bin/ffmpeg with libx264 encoder for H.264 encoding
POST /api/upload - VERIFIED: Returns thumbnail URL in response for video uploads
POST /api/stories - VERIFIED: Creates story with thumbnail field for video type
GET /api/stories - VERIFIED: Returns stories with thumbnail field populated for all video stories
GET /api/media/{filename} - VERIFIED: Supports Range requests (HTTP 206) for iOS video streaming
GET /api/media/{filename} - VERIFIED: Serves thumbnail images correctly (HTTP 200)
HEAD /api/media/{filename} - VERIFIED: Returns file info with Accept-Ranges: bytes header
Video encoding - VERIFIED: Videos are re-encoded to H.264 Main profile for iOS compatibility
Database - VERIFIED: All 21 video stories have non-null thumbnail fields
seed_data_creation: Test videos created using ffmpeg during test execution. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stories video system fully tested and working. ffmpeg installed at /usr/bin/ffmpeg with H.264 encoder. All video uploads generate thumbnails. All 21 existing video stories have thumbnails. Range request support (HTTP 206) working for iOS video streaming. Video compression uses H.264 Main profile with yuv420p pixel format for maximum iOS compatibility.
mocked_api_note: None - all APIs are real. ffmpeg is installed and functional.
